title: helia alba
intro: Helia alba, also known as the White Heliotrope, is a flowering plant belonging to the Heliotropium genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Helia alba include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Helia alba is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its safety and efficacy may vary depending on the specific preparation and individual use.
